questions.statement: In an election between A and B, B secured 16,200 votes and defeated A by 8% of the total votes. If there are no invalid votes, what is the difference in votes between A and B?
The numerator of a fraction is decreased by 25% and the denominator is increased by 25%. New fraction is how much percentage less than the original fraction?
The salary of an employee is first increased by 15% and then it is decreased by 25%. What is the percentage increase or decrease in his salary?&nbsp;
In a panchayat election, there were two candidates A and B. Candidate A got 42% of the votes and lost to B by 8000 votes. What is the total number of votes?&nbsp;
A person, who spends 68% of his monthly income, is able to save Rs. 14,720 per month. Find his total expenses.&nbsp;
